words.def: occupy in an agreeable, entertaining or pleasant fashion
words.zh: a. 有趣的, 引人發笑的

words.def: an act that exploits or victimizes someone (treats them unfairly)
a perceptible indication of something not immediately apparent (as a visible clue that something has happened)
words.zh: n. 符號, 招牌, 徵兆, 正負號, 手勢

words.def: any very large body of (salt) water
words.zh: n. 主要部分, 幹線, 體力, 力量, 主群組

words.def: an adult person who is male (as opposed to a woman)
words.zh: n. 男人, 人類, 人

words.def: the state of matter distinguished from the solid and liquid states by: relatively low density and viscosity; relatively great expansion and contraction with changes in pressure and temperature; the ability to diffuse readily; and the spontaneous tendency to become distributed uniformly throughout any container
words.zh: n. 氣體, 汽油, 瓦斯

words.def: a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)
the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system
words.zh: n. 太陽, 日, 日光, 陽光
